productDisplayName: Puma Men's Ferrari Logo Red T-shirt
description: CompositionRed round neck short sleeved t-shirt made of 35% cotton and 65% polyester, has green-white-red fabric tape on the inseam of the neckline, chequered pattern on the back, ferrari logo appliqued on the left chest and right sleeve, and puma's logo appliqued on the back of the neckFittingRegularWash care Gentle machine wash in lukewarm water at 40 degrees Do not bleach Tumble dry at low temperature Cool iron Do not dry clean Sport this red t-shirt from puma, and all your friends will will know a Ferrari fan is in their midst. The Ferrari logo looks regal on the chest, and the chequered pattern on the back reminds everyone of the Formula One flag. This red hot tee looks best with jeans and cool shoes. It's time to race!Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
